onboarding.allDone: All set! You can now use the system.

partner.title: Create your first partner
partner.description: Partners are external entities like clients or suppliers you work with.

paymentMethod.title: Add an account
paymentMethod.description: Add a bank account, card, or cash method to manage your transactions.

linkPMToPartner.title: Link account to partner
linkPMToPartner.description: Associate your account with a partner to track accounts per entity.

project.title: Create your first project
project.description: Projects are your main workspace for managing finances.

assignPartner.title: Link partner to project
assignPartner.description: Assign your partner to the project from the project settings.

linkPaymentMethod.title: Link account to project
linkPaymentMethod.description: Link your account to the project to start recording transactions.
